module.name: require-timeout-for-io
module.description: Require timeout or cancellation options for external IO calls.

scenarios.name: should allow IO calls with signal, timeout, or approved wrappers
scenarios.given: code that calls fetch, HTTP clients, subprocesses, or custom IO through cancellation-aware options

scenarios.name: should report fetch, HTTP client, and subprocess calls without cancellation
scenarios.given: production code that calls external IO without timeout or signal options

scenarios.name: should skip tests by default and check them when configured
scenarios.given: IO calls appear in test files
scenarios.then: test files are exempt by default and reported when configured
